---
title: "Presentation Title"
subtitle: "GenAI in Pharma"
author:
  - name: "Peng Zhang, PhD"
    affiliation: "CIMS Global"
date: "2026-06-16"
---

## Agenda

- Topic 1
- Topic 2
- Topic 3

## Topic 1

Content goes here.

::: {.notes}
Speaker notes go here.
:::

## Topic 2

```r
# Your R/Python code here
```

## Summary

- Key takeaway 1
- Key takeaway 2
- Key takeaway 3

## Thank You

Questions?

::: {.smaller}
Slides: [github.com/pzhang724/pre-materials](https://github.com/pzhang724/pre-materials)
:::
